info.title: Fixing sorald compilation errors with JavaParser

parts.text: "Project @sorald/ does not compile. Plan: 1) Run mvn compile in the project @sorald/ to get the compilation errors only. 2) Generate a JavaParser source code transformation to fix the errors.    - Use the project in folder @/workspace/javaparser-base-template/ as the base project template.    - Use JavaParser AST manipulation to create the transformation.    - Save the transformation rules inside the folder @/workspace/javaparser-base-template/, e.g., in /workspace/javaparser-base-template/src/main/java/github/chains/Main.java.    - Use the JavaParser API documentation located in folder /workspace/javaparser-api-docs/ for reference. 3) Ensure the generated transformation compiles correctly. 4) Apply the transformation to fix the compilation errors. 5) Verify that the project now compiles successfully with mvn compile. "

This is a complex multi-step task. Let me break it down:

1. Run `mvn compile` in the @sorald/ project to get compilation errors
2. Generate a JavaParser source code transformation to fix the errors
   - Use /workspace/javaparser-base-template/ as the base project template
   - Use JavaParser AST manipulation
   - Save transformation rules in the template folder
   - Use JavaParser API docs in /workspace/javaparser-api-docs/ for reference
3. Ensure the generated transformation compiles correctly
4. Apply the transformation to fix the compilation errors
5. Verify the project compiles successfully with `mvn compile`

Let me start by creating a todo list and then running the first step to get the compilation errors.

50: import org.sonarsource.sonarlint.core.rule.extractor.SonarLintRuleDefinition;
51: import sorald.FileUtils;
52: import sorald.util.ConfigLoader;
53: 
54: public final class SonarLintEngine extends AbstractSonarLintEngine {
55: 
56:     // The order of these initialisations is important as each field is dependent upon the previous
57:     // one.
58:     private static final String SONAR_JAVA_PLUGIN_JAR_NAME = "sonar-java-plugin.jar";
59:     private static final Path sonarJavaPlugin = getOrDownloadSonarJavaPlugin().getPath();
60:     private static final StandaloneGlobalConfiguration globalConfig = buildGlobalConfig();
61:     private static final LoadedPluginsThatDoesNotCloseLoader loadedPlugins = getLoadedPlugins();
62:     private static final Map<String, SonarLintRuleDefinition> allRulesDefinitionsByKey =
63:             computeAllRulesDefinitionsByKey();
64:     private static final AnalysisEngineConfiguration analysisGlobalConfig =
65:             buildAnalysisEngineConfiguration();
66: 
67:     // The only instance of this singleton class
68:     private static SonarLintEngine theOnlyInstance;
69: 
70:     // We need to reinitialise it before starting analysis of any source files on any rules.
71:     private AnalysisEngine analysisEngine;
72: 
73:     private SonarLintEngine() {
74:         super(null);
75:         setLogging(null);
76: 
77:         this.analysisEngine = new AnalysisEngine(analysisGlobalConfig, loadedPlugins, null);
78:     }
79: 
80:     private static SonarJavaJarHolder getOrDownloadSonarJavaPlugin() {
81:         File cacheDirectory = FileUtils.getCacheDir();
82:         String sonarJavaPluginFileName =
83:                 cacheDirectory + System.getProperty("file.separator") + SONAR_JAVA_PLUGIN_JAR_NAME;
84:         File sonarJavaPlugin = new File(sonarJavaPluginFileName);
85:         if (sonarJavaPlugin.exists()) {
86:             return new SonarJavaJarHolder(sonarJavaPlugin.toPath(), false);
87:         }
88: 
89:         try {
90:             InputStream inputStream = new URL(ConfigLoader.getSonarJavaPluginUrl()).openStream();
91:             Files.copy(
92:                     inputStream,
93:                     Paths.get(sonarJavaPluginFileName),
94:                     StandardCopyOption.REPLACE_EXISTING);
95:             return new SonarJavaJarHolder(new File(sonarJavaPluginFileName).toPath(), true);
96:         } catch (IOException e) {
97:             throw new RuntimeException("Could not download Sonar Java plugin", e); // NOSONAR:S112
98:         }
99:     }
100: 
101:     /** Store the path to SonarJava plugin and if it is downloaded or fetched from cache. */
102:     public static class SonarJavaJarHolder {
103:         private final Path path;
104:         private final boolean downloaded;
105: 
106:         SonarJavaJarHolder(Path path, boolean downloaded) {
107:             this.path = path;
108:             this.downloaded = downloaded;
109:         }
110: 
111:         public Path getPath() {
112:             return path;
113:         }
114: 
115:         public boolean isDownloaded() {
116:             return downloaded;
117:         }
118:     }
119: 
120:     private static StandaloneGlobalConfiguration buildGlobalConfig() {
121:         return StandaloneGlobalConfiguration.builder()
122:                 .addPlugin(sonarJavaPlugin)
123:                 .addEnabledLanguage(Language.JAVA)
124:                 .build();
125:     }
126: 
127:     private static LoadedPluginsThatDoesNotCloseLoader getLoadedPlugins() {
128:         var config =
129:                 new Configuration(
130:                         globalConfig.getPluginPaths(),
131:                         globalConfig.getEnabledLanguages(),
132:                         Optional.ofNullable(globalConfig.getNodeJsVersion()));
133: 
134:         PluginsLoadResult loadedResult = new PluginsLoader().load(config);
135:         // Default loaded result stops the loader. The following code prevents that.
136: 
137:         Map<String, PluginRequirementsCheckResult> pluginCheckResultByKeys =
138:                 loadedResult.getPluginCheckResultByKeys();
139:         Collection<PluginInfo> allPlugins = getAllPlugins(pluginCheckResultByKeys);
140: 
141:         // We do not want this loader to close.
142:         PluginInstancesLoader instancesLoader = new PluginInstancesLoader();
143:         Map<String, Plugin> pluginInstancesByKeys =
144:                 instancesLoader.instantiatePluginClasses(allPlugins);
145: 
146:         return new LoadedPluginsThatDoesNotCloseLoader(
147:                 pluginInstancesByKeys, new PluginInstancesLoader());
148:     }
149: 
150:     private static Collection<PluginInfo> getAllPlugins(
151:             Map<String, PluginRequirementsCheckResult> pluginCheckResultByKeys) {
152:         return pluginCheckResultByKeys.values().stream()
153:                 .map(PluginRequirementsCheckResult::getPlugin)
154:                 .collect(toList());
155:     }
156: 
157:     private static Map<String, SonarLintRuleDefinition> computeAllRulesDefinitionsByKey() {
158:         return loadPluginMetadata(loadedPlugins, globalConfig.getEnabledLanguages(), false, false);
159:     }
160: 
161:     private static AnalysisEngineConfiguration buildAnalysisEngineConfiguration() {
162:         return AnalysisEngineConfiguration.builder()
163:                 .addEnabledLanguages(globalConfig.getEnabledLanguages())
164:                 .setClientPid(globalConfig.getClientPid())
165:                 .setExtraProperties(globalConfig.extraProperties())
166:                 .setWorkDir(globalConfig.getWorkDir())
167:                 .setModulesProvider(globalConfig.getModulesProvider())
168:                 .build();
169:     }
170: 
171:     /** Get or creates the one and only instance of this class. */
172:     public static SonarLintEngine getInstance() {
173:         if (theOnlyInstance == null) {
174:             theOnlyInstance = new SonarLintEngine();
175:         } else {
176:             theOnlyInstance.recreateAnalysisEngine();
177:         }
178:         return theOnlyInstance;
179:     }
180: 
181:     /**
182:      * Recreates the analysis engine as it is stopped after each analysis executed by {@link
183:      * SonarStaticAnalyzer}.
184:      */
185:     public void recreateAnalysisEngine() {
186:         this.analysisEngine = new AnalysisEngine(analysisGlobalConfig, loadedPlugins, logOutput);
187:     }
188: 
189:     @Override
190:     public AnalysisEngine getAnalysisEngine() {
191:         return analysisEngine;
192:     }
193: 
194:     public AnalysisResults analyze(
195:             StandaloneAnalysisConfiguration configuration,
196:             IssueListener issueListener,
197:             @Nullable ClientLogOutput logOutput,
198:             @Nullable ClientProgressMonitor monitor) {
199:         requireNonNull(configuration);
200:         requireNonNull(issueListener);
201:         setLogging(logOutput);
202: 
203:         var analysisConfig =
204:                 AnalysisConfiguration.builder()
205:                         .addInputFiles(configuration.inputFiles())
206:                         .putAllExtraProperties(configuration.extraProperties())
207:                         .addActiveRules(identifyActiveRules(configuration))
208:                         .setBaseDir(configuration.baseDir())
209:                         .build();
210:         try {
211:             var analysisResults =
212:                     analysisEngine
213:                             .post(
214:                                     new AnalyzeCommand(
215:                                             configuration.moduleKey(),
216:                                             analysisConfig,
217:                                             i ->
218:                                                     issueListener.handle(
219:                                                             new DefaultClientIssue(
220:                                                                     i,
221:                                                                     allRulesDefinitionsByKey.get(
222:                                                                             i.getRuleKey()))),
223:                                             logOutput),
224:                                     new ProgressMonitor(monitor))
225:                             .get();
226:             return analysisResults == null ? new AnalysisResults() : analysisResults;
227:         } catch (ExecutionException e) {
228:             throw SonarLintWrappedException.wrap(e);
229:         } catch (InterruptedException e) {
230:             Thread.currentThread().interrupt();
231:             throw SonarLintWrappedException.wrap(e);
232:         }
233:     }
234: 
235:     /** Returns all rule keys available at the provided version of Sonar Java. */
236:     public static Map<String, SonarLintRuleDefinition> getAllRulesDefinitionsByKey() {
237:         return allRulesDefinitionsByKey;
238:     }
239: 
240:     private Collection<ActiveRule> identifyActiveRules(
241:             StandaloneAnalysisConfiguration configuration) {
242:         Set<String> includedRules =
243:                 configuration.includedRules().stream().map(RuleKey::toString).collect(toSet());
244: 
245:         return allRulesDefinitionsByKey.values().stream()
246:                 .filter(isImplementedBySonarJavaPlugin(includedRules))
247:                 .map(
248:                         rd -> {
249:                             ActiveRule activeRule =
250:                                     new ActiveRule(rd.getKey(), rd.getLanguage().getLanguageKey());
251:                             RuleKey ruleKey = RuleKey.parse(rd.getKey());
252:                             if (configuration.ruleParameters().containsKey(ruleKey)) {
253:                                 activeRule.setParams(configuration.ruleParameters().get(ruleKey));
254:                             }
255:                             return activeRule;
256:                         })
257:                 .collect(Collectors.toList());
258:     }
259: 
260:     private static Predicate<? super SonarLintRuleDefinition> isImplementedBySonarJavaPlugin(
261:             Set<String> includedRules) {
262:         return r -> includedRules.contains(r.getKey());
263:     }
264: 
265:     public void stop() {
266:         analysisEngine.stop();
267:     }
268: 
269:     public List<PluginDetails> getPluginDetails() {
270:         throw new RuntimeException("Not implemented"); // NOSONAR:S112
271:     }
272: 
273:     /**
274:      * Overriding this class to ensure that plugin instance loader never closes throughout the
275:      * lifecycle of JVM.
276:      */
277:     public static class LoadedPluginsThatDoesNotCloseLoader extends LoadedPlugins {
278: 
279:         public LoadedPluginsThatDoesNotCloseLoader(
280:                 Map<String, Plugin> pluginInstancesByKeys,
281:                 PluginInstancesLoader pluginInstancesLoader) {
282:             super(pluginInstancesByKeys, pluginInstancesLoader);
283:         }
284: 
285:         @Override
286:         public void unload() {
287:             // Prevent closing of `pluginInstancesLoader`
288:         }
289:     }
290: }

(End of file - total 290 lines)
